utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You guys got anything to eat ? I just went down to Johnos for some chicken and it was closed !

emotion_cause.span: 3_I just went down to Johnos for some chicken and it was closed !

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Oh , I took Larry there to eat but it was all violated . So we shut it down !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Pheebs , if this guy keeps closing down all of our favorite places , where are we gonna eat ? !

emotion_cause.span: 5_this guy keeps closing down all of our favorite places

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: I do not know , clean places ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Do not let him in ! I am supposed to be at a regatta gala .

emotion_cause.span: 9_Do not let him in ! I am supposed to be at a regatta gala .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: We will be right there ! Can not you just say it starts later ?

emotion_cause.span: 9_Do not let him in ! I am supposed to be at a regatta gala .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: What ? What kind of a regatta gala starts at night ? !

emotion_cause.span: 11_What ? What kind of a regatta gala starts at night ? !

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: Hey , hi , I need a ladle . You got a ladle ?

utterances.speaker: Danny
utterances.text: Thanks , see you at the party .

utterances.speaker: Phoebe
utterances.text: Hey , guys , you know what Larry would say ? He would say , " See you ladle . "
